zone.name: Coastal waters from Suwannee River to Aripeka FL out 20 nm
zone.synopsis: A weak front stalls north of the area through the weekend. Light to moderate onshore flow becomes southeast Saturday. Seas building slightly behind the front Sunday. No marine hazards expected through Saturday.

period.name: Today
period.weather: A slight chance of showers in the afternoon

period.name: Saturday
period.wind: Southeast winds 5 to 10 knots, becoming south in the afternoon
period.weather: Mostly sunny. Bay and inland waters smooth
period.note: Good window for the offshore charter out of Bayport. Departure 6:30 AM favorable.

period.name: Saturday Night
period.weather: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after midnight

period.name: Sunday
period.weather: Showers likely. Small craft should exercise caution
period.note: Backup charter date. Seas building. Make the call by 5 AM.
